children.text: My favorite music is folk and classical
My favorite movies are Alice in wonderland
My favorite sport to watch is gymnastics,
My favorite sport to play is running with some light music.the fresher air keep my mind bright.
In my spare time, I like Listening to music,walking in the forest.
In childhood, I dreamed of becoming A writer
10 years from now, I would like keep a young heart
My first memory is play with butterfly in the garden.
Of all the places I would like to visit, I would most like to visit Sydney
My friends call me The sleeping beauty
My first kiss was when I was i gave it to my mom
My favorite season is spring,everythning is growing up in spring.
My favorite food to eat is vegetables
My favorite food to make is Dumplings,noodles.
Three things that I would take with me to a deserted island colour pen,Drawing board,where i can write down the beautiful sunset.
If I could choose an era to live in, I would like to live California .
If there is anything I would do over again in my life, accept the love
The most important thing that makes a house a home trust between eac other
